LanguageData.EM.BallzSemenPoolModifiersTip: RJW gonads link: virtual pool capacity ×{0}, refill ×{1}, draw ×{2}.
LanguageData.EM.UISection.BallzGonadsDesc: When the gonads mod is active, apply tight physiology-flavoured modifiers: narrow gonad capacity band, testosterone band ~90–104% with organic testes, harsh gear/elastration penalties, estrogen→milk off by default (optional ±0.7% if enabled). Master switch disables the whole block.
LanguageData.EM.BallzIntegrationNotDetected: RJW Balls & Ovaries not in the mod list — these options have no effect until that package is enabled.
LanguageData.EM.Ballz.EnableDesc: Master switch for hooks into GenericTesticles, hormones (TestosteroneEffect / EstrogenEffect), Neutered, Elastrated, and prosthetic gonads.
LanguageData.EM.Ballz.GonadSemenCapacity: Scale virtual semen capacity by gonads
LanguageData.EM.Ballz.GonadSemenCapacityDesc: Organic testicles: very tight band (~96–103%). Prosthetics without organic testes: wood ~12%, steel ~18%, archotech ~28% of baseline cap. Final multiplier clamped ≤105%.
LanguageData.EM.Ballz.TestosteroneRefillDesc: TestosteroneEffect only nudges refill (~90–104%) when organic testes exist. Hypo- and hyper-androgenism are both damped for gameplay stability.
LanguageData.EM.Ballz.TestosteroneRequiresPenisPoolDe: When on, testosterone only affects refill if the pawn has living testicular tissue (Ballz organic testicle hediff on Gonads). Castrated or prosthetic-only scrotums do not respond. Turn off to apply testosterone to everyone who has the hormone hediff.
LanguageData.EM.Ballz.TesticleGearDesc: Stricter constriction model: stretchers/rings cut refill more; cages/bindings/separator hit refill and draw harder. Comfort harness remains neutral.
LanguageData.EM.Ballz.NeuteredNoSemenDesc: Neutered hediff: no refill and no draw from the virtual semen pool (existing stock drains until empty).
LanguageData.EM.Ballz.ElastrationPenaltyDesc: Elastrated severity progressively cuts refill; RecoveringFromElastration applies a small extra penalty.
LanguageData.EM.Ballz.EstrogenLactationDesc: Off by default. If enabled, EstrogenEffect changes inflow by at most about ±0.7% (hard-clamped ±2%). Prolactin / lactation hediffs remain the real drivers.
